docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS MUNGUIA, LIDIA ROSIBEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. VISITING JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT; APPEARING IN COURT IS VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT LIDIA ROSIBEL PALACIOS MUNGUIA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS MUNGUIA, LIDIA ROSIBEL
DECLARATION EXPLAINING CASE AND PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2025 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-16-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT UNAVAILABLE DURING CIVIC CENTER POWER OUTAGE. NO APPEARANCES. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-16-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT LIDIA ROSIBEL PALACIOS MUNGUIA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
